title: Skip Sleep
description: A mod that lets you skip the sleep animation and go right to day
body:
A simple mod that lets you skip the sleep animation


All you have to do is right click on a bed and it becomes day!

It will function normally with things like mobs stopping sleeping

Only difference is when you right click on a bed it skips to morning and leaves a message about that in chat
(Can be hidden with my other mod Hide Chat)
